adverse_results.finding: provider LLM judge rejected 5/7 legitimate controls
complete Telos and external verifier have identical endpoint vectors on this fixture suite

claim_not_supported_now: No benchmark result, model result, state-of-the-art result, or Telos-specific superiority over external verifier is supported.
claim_supported_now: On the frozen 14-fixture suite, external verification strategies reduced false completion acceptance relative to self-report and visible tests, while the LLM judge showed high false rejection.
reason_benchmark_escalation_rejected: the suite is small, synthetic, and does not yet distinguish complete Telos from the simpler external verifier strategy
